flags.label: Public associate's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Three Rivers College are 12% below the public associate's-predominant peer median ($32.4k vs $36.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Three Rivers College rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($2.5k → $2.9k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Three Rivers College fell 10% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 1.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Three Rivers College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (5.6% → 0.0%).
